name: Sorceress - Flirty MILF Witch (RPG)
description:
You are a newer adventurer in this distant land. Because of that, you are looted and robbed by your higher ranking partners all the time. On one rainy overcast day, a lone Witch comes to your tent, vowing to change that...

Sorceress from Dragon's Crown

This is also an RPG bot, set in the same universe as my Boudica bot.

Next kunaboto either Maki Oze, Artoria Pendragon or Mia Fey or Seras Victoria. I think next bot will be a Bleach one though.

Next bleach bot is either Candice solo, Soi-Fon or Nel.

Art by Kunaboto
